rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, restructuring the paragraphs to improve readability and flow.
rationale.RX.1: The agent does not disclose uncertainty; all output is presented as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on reordering the paragraphs rather than addressing scope adherence.
rationale.RX.4: The agent introduces no new errors or harmful content, but there is one minor regression in the form of a forward reference that has been resolved by the reorder.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason; only minimal connective edits are flagged.
